title: Role badge
description: Colour-coded chip for a role — shows is_system + guard_name + min_tier gate + application-scope at a glance. Used in tables, cards, and picker dropdowns wherever a role's identity needs a visual identifier.

role.description: Role model row. Reads role.name, role.guard_name, role.is_system, role.display_label, role.role_definition?.min_tier.

showLabel.description: When false (default), renders only the badge. When true, renders label + badge.
